headline: Beyond RAG: Our Shift to an Agentic System
description: Why a pure RAG setup hits its limits and how we evolved the architecture into a fully agentic system with tool use, planning loops, and dynamic context management.

headline: ReplayLLM — File-based LLM Provider for LiteLLM
description: ReplayLLM is a drop-in LiteLLM provider that replays pre-scripted responses from a file—including streaming and tool calls—without hitting a real model, enabling fully deterministic integration tests for AI agents.
